test.description: Regression test for https://github.com/maplibre/maplibre-gl-js/issues/7704. A line with a top-level zoom `step` whose branches each evaluate to a feature-dependent dasharray. Because branches reference `["get"]`, the expression is composite (data-driven) and routes through `CrossFadedDasharrayBinder` rather than the constant uniform path. At zoom 10.5 (past the step), the line should render with short dashes ([2,2]). Before the fix, the data-driven path swapped the cross-fade `from` and `to` attributes relative to the constant path, so the pre-step [8,4] dashes were rendered instead.
